channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: RAAF E-7A Wedgetail Aircraft Information Currently Unavailable
item.description: The E-7A Wedgetail aircraft, operated by the Royal Australian Air Force (RAAF), is currently the focus of attention, although detailed information about it is temporarily unavailable. The Age website ...

item.title: Profiles of Candidates for Antipolo 2nd District Special Election 2026
item.description: Voters in Antipolo’s 2nd District will elect a new congressman on March 14, 2026, in a special election to fill the seat left vacant by the late Romeo Acop. Six candidates are contesting for the posit...

item.title: Philippine President Marcos maintains stance against rejoining ICC
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. remains firm on not rejoining the International Criminal Court (ICC), despite calls from several opposition lawmakers for the Philippines to return to the international ...

item.title: Rajasthan removes two-child restriction for panchayat elections after three decades
item.description: The Rajasthan Legislative Assembly on March 10, 2026, passed the Rajasthan Panchayati Raj (Amendment) Bill, 2026, abolishing the two-child norm that disqualified candidates with more than two children...

item.title: Nairobi Floods Expose Gaps in Disaster Preparedness and Emergency Response
item.description: The recent floods in Nairobi have tragically highlighted weaknesses in disaster preparedness despite timely weather warnings from the Kenya Meteorological Department. On March 3, officials alerted the...

item.title: US President claims progress in Iran conflict amid regional tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated on Monday that the military operations in Iran are largely complete and progressing ahead of schedule. Despite these claims, the conflict continues to escalate, with I...

item.title: Gauteng Launches Specialised Police Units to Tackle Political Killings and Organised Crime
item.description: The Gauteng Provincial Legislature's Portfolio Committee on Community Safety has welcomed the South African Police Service's recent establishment of two specialised units in Gauteng. One unit will foc...

item.title: Israel's President Expresses Concern Over Recent Antisemitic Attacks in Toronto
item.description: Israel's President Isaac Herzog has voiced concern over a recent wave of antisemitic attacks targeting Toronto synagogues. Speaking on the social media platform X, Herzog highlighted the ongoing threa...

item.title: Government Supports Women Entrepreneurs to Lead in Key Economic Sectors
item.description: The government of Tanzania is seriously backing women entrepreneurs so they can play strong roles in driving the country's industrial and trade growth. Speaking at the Women in Business Gala, Minister...

item.title: Authorities Investigate Homemade Explosives at Anti-Muslim Protest Near Mayor Mamdani's Residence
item.description: New York City police are investigating the throwing of homemade explosive devices during a protest outside Mayor Zohran Mamdani's residence at Gracie Mansion. Authorities have described the act as pot...

item.title: Rediscovering Wild Foods: Mushrooms and Sea Beet in Modern British Diets
item.description: In 16th-century Britain, foraged foods such as wild mushrooms, sea beet, samphire, wild garlic, and hazelnuts were a regular part of daily meals. Rural households relied on pottage, soups, and seasona...

item.title: ASX rises as global markets recover and oil prices ease
item.description: The Australian sharemarket rebounded at the open on Tuesday, clawing back some of Monday’s significant losses, as global markets responded to comments from former US President Donald Trump regarding t...

item.title: Veteran Nigerian Coach and First Indigenous Super Eagles Handler, Festus Adegboye Onigbinde, Passes Away at 88
item.description: High Chief Festus Adegboye Onigbinde, one of the most respected figures in Nigerian football, has passed on, as confirmed by him family on Monday, March 9, 2026. The statement from the family, release...

item.title: Bafana Bafana recall Zwane and Adams for Panama friendlies
item.description: Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos has named his preliminary squad for upcoming friendly matches against Panama, with notable recalls including Mamelodi Sundowns’ Themba Zwane and Jayden Adams. Zwane had ...

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Conflict: Iranian Women’s Soccer Players Granted Humanitarian Visas Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran continues to escalate with significant humanitarian and military developments. Over 1,300 people have reportedly been killed in Iran since the initial att...

item.title: Rukwa Region to get electricity from national grid by May 2026
item.description: People of Rukwa Region go start receiving electricity straight from the national grid come May 2026, once the 400kV high-voltage power line from Iringa is done, Deputy Minister for Energy, Ms Salome M...

item.title: Accused of killing B.C. Mountie Shaelyn Yang testifies during court fitness hearing
item.description: A man charged with the killing of B.C. Mountie Shaelyn Yang has provided testimony during a court hearing to determine his fitness to stand trial. The hearing, held in Vancouver, focuses on whether th...

item.title: Peter Broelman's Daily Editorial Cartoons Collection
item.description: This article presents the latest works of Peter Broelman, The Canberra Times' editorial cartoonist, offering a humorous take on current events. Broelman's cartoons are a staple for readers seeking wit...

item.title: ACT Wazalendo urges social unity and moral values during Ramadan in Pemba
item.description: During Ramadan, leaders from the opposition party ACT Wazalendo in Pemba are calling citizens to strengthen social unity, compassion, and moral upbringing of children. Party chairman Othman Masoud Oth...

item.title: Indian Embassy Facilitates Return of Stranded Nationals from Bahrain via Saudi Transit
item.description: The Indian Embassy in Bahrain has made arrangements to help Indian nationals stranded due to the suspension of commercial flights at Bahrain airport since February 28. The embassy is coordinating with...
